vocab.meaning: một món đồ kỷ niệm điển hình/vô giá
vocab.example: The silver watch my mentor gave me upon my promotion serves as a quintessential keepsake of my professional growth.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thẩm mỹ vượt thời gian
vocab.example: I was gifted an analog watch that possesses a timeless aesthetic appeal, making it suitable for both formal and casual attire.

vocab.meaning: để lại hoặc tặng lại một chiếc đồng hồ (thường mang tính kế thừa)
vocab.example: It is a tradition in my family for fathers to bequeath a fine timepiece to their sons when they reach the age of majority.

vocab.meaning: gợi lại những kỷ niệm đẹp đẽ
vocab.example: Every time I glance at the watch gifted by my partner, it instantly evokes fond memories of our first anniversary.

vocab.meaning: tay nghề chế tác đồng hồ tinh xảo
vocab.example: The watch I received is a masterpiece of exquisite horological craftsmanship, featuring a visible movement that is fascinating to observe.
